mapper.select: select substr(add_time,1,10) as day, count(distinct id) as users from litemall_user group by substr(add_time,1,10)

select substr(add_time,1,10) as day, count(id) as orders, count(distinct user_id) as customers, sum(actual_price) as amount, round(sum(actual_price)/count(distinct user_id),2) as pcr from litemall_order where order_status in(401,402) group by substr(add_time,1,10)
select substr(add_time,1, 10) as day, count(distinct order_id) as orders, sum(number) as products, sum(number*price) as amount from litemall_order_goods group by substr(add_time,1, 10)

select substr(u.add_time,1,10) as cohortDay, count(distinct u.id) as retainedUsers from litemall_user u where u.deleted = 0 and substr(u.add_time,1,10) = #{cohortDate} and exists ( select 1 from litemall_user u2 where u2.id = u.id and substr(u2.last_login_time,1,10) = date_add(#{cohortDate}, interval #{dayOffset} day) )
select count(*) as totalUsers from litemall_user where deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS wau FROM litemall_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND last_login_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE(last_login_time) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS mau FROM litemall_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND last_login_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE(last_login_time) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT CASE WHEN MONTH(pay_time) IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 'spring' WHEN MONTH(pay_time) IN (12, 1, 2) THEN 'winter' END as season, COUNT(id) as orders, COALESCE(SUM(actual_price), 0) as amount FROM litemall_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND order_status IN (401, 402) AND YEAR(pay_time) = #{year} AND MONTH(pay_time) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 12) GROUP BY CASE WHEN MONTH(pay_time) IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 'spring' WHEN MONTH(pay_time) IN (12, 1, 2) THEN 'winter' END

SELECT g.id as goodsId, g.name, c.name as category, SUM(og.number) as sales, SUM(og.number * og.price) as amount FROM litemall_goods g JOIN litemall_order_goods og ON g.id = og.goods_id JOIN litemall_order o ON og.order_id = o.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (401, 402) JOIN litemall_category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.deleted = 0 AND YEAR(o.pay_time) = #{year} AND ( (#{season} = 'spring' AND MONTH(o.pay_time) IN (3, 4, 5)) OR (#{season} = 'winter' AND MONTH(o.pay_time) IN (12, 1, 2)) ) GROUP BY g.id, g.name, c.name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
